prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Terminations & splices, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: wrong wirenut size. The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: NEC 110.14.
title: Tool and material selection: Terminations & splices (production floor)
